hotel_name: Khách sạn Sonavie Ninh Bình (Sonavie Hotel Ninh Binh)

reviews.title: The worst hotel in the world.
reviews.text:
I made a payment in advance through the app, chose a room based on the pictures, and selected a room on the upper floor, but when I arrived, the hotel informed me that there were no rooms available and pushed me down to the basement along with the parking garage. If I wanted to move to the upper floor, I had to pay a fee. I requested that if the room I booked was not available, the hotel should cancel my reservation without charge, but they insisted there would be a fee and asked me to cancel. If I canceled, I would lose money; the hotel is very clever in taking advantage of customers. The bathroom smelled, the previous guests' hair was not cleaned up, the towels and drinking water were not provided sufficiently, and although they claimed the room was cheap, it was not cheap at all. I truly advise anyone booking for two people to choose another hotel; you might arrive only to find everything booked, or end up in the parking basement or pay a fee to go upstairs. This is the worst hotel and service I've ever encountered. 

I really don't understand who designed this hotel to put guests in a damp basement while the reception is on the second floor. I lost money and gained this experience to sincerely warn you not to waste your money like I did.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: The hotel is very disappointing. It took an hour to check in. My friend's room is on the first floor and is very noisy. We asked to change rooms but it wasn't allowed. At 4 AM, they played loud music which made it impossible for my friend to sleep. A terrible experience.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: The price is high compared to the amenities and services provided. The price should be adjusted to be more appropriate. The staff is rigid and not well-trained as a reception. The equipment in the room is decent and clean.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: It's terrible that they charge an extra 200,000 VND just for moving the bed 25cm.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The new room is quite beautiful, super close to the old town of Hoa Lu, and the location is very convenient for moving to tourist spots. The staff is very enthusiastic. The hotel is new, but I rate the service as quite good. I didn't think I could book a room that meets my expectations like this. I will return next time.

reviews.title: Okay, everyone.
reviews.text: I called to request an early check-in, and they were very supportive. The staff was friendly and cheerful. The hotel looks beautiful from the outside, the room is nice, well-equipped, the elevators inside and outside are very new, it's not noisy, clean, and well-equipped.

reviews.title: The room is clean, the hotel owner is lovely.
reviews.text: The room is beautiful, clean, right next to the old town of Hoa Lu, fully equipped. At first, I was a bit hesitant when I saw the criticism, but after staying, it was very okay.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is nice, super satisfied, new, clean, but missing toiletries. The receptionist is quite nice. We were assigned a room on the first floor, which is super noisy; the two girls couldn't sleep peacefully at night because the footsteps outside were very loud, so we were scared and couldn't dare to sleep 🥲. In the afternoon, when we booked extra hours, it was also super noisy because of arguments and all sorts of sounds, so we couldn't sleep. We will support again but if we could be on a different floor 😉.
